content.en:
Not long after, Zhan Ancestor talked to the other ancestors, and many ancestors agreed to let Ye Tian become one of the patrols, but there were also many ancestors who disagreed.

The ancestors who disagreed were almost all the ancestors of the Dark Destruction Domain, who had already had conflicts with the Dark Sanctuary, and now they were only reluctant to cooperate here because of the threat of the Silent Extinction Clan.

If the threat of the Silent Extinction is lifted in the future, it is estimated that both sides will fight together.

Therefore, it is normal for them to disagree with Ye Tian to become a patrol.

However, it is enough for some Ancestors to agree, and it doesn't matter if other Ancestors disagree.

Anyway, Zhan Zu let Ye Tian become a patrol, what can they do?

......

"Wanfa War Ancestor, you can become a patrol, this is a special communication treasure for patrolling, which can be used here!"

Zhan Zu gave Ye Tian a black bracelet and said.

"Hmm!"

Ye Tian nodded and accepted the bracelet.

From now on, he will be one of the patrols of this space, patrolling the various defense lines, and if there is a Silent Clan somewhere, he must go to support.

After becoming a patrol, Ye Tian patrolled the defense line everywhere, and it was very easy.

In the blink of an eye, hundreds of thousands of years have passed.

During this period, Ye Tian rescued various defense lines many times, and also fell three times, of course, he also attacked the Silent Annihilation Clan frantically, even at the expense of this copy body, but also to kill a Silent Annihilation Clan.

Although it fell three times, he killed a total of five one-striped Silence Extinguishers, so he gained a lot of contribution points, and exchanged for two Silence Grass, and during the patrol, he also found two Silence Extinguishing Treasures, although they are both very low-level treasures, but they are also good harvests.

These Silent Destruction Treasures were all sent back to the Xuanxu Saint Realm by him, and the ontology was refined, and the Ancestral Body and the Supreme Domain Body had made great progress, of course, they were still far from being promoted.

this day.

When Ye Tian was patrolling, he sensed the fluctuation of the extinguishing energy.

The other Superior Domain Ancestors, even the First Ancestors, were estimated to be inferior to him when they sensed the fluctuations of the Silence Energy.

Because he possessed the Ancestral Endowment of Silence, while the other Superior Domain Ancestors and Ancestors did not have such a talent.

Wow!

Ye Tian flew over, he felt that it must be a sign of the birth of the Silent Annihilation Treasure, and it was not very far from his current position, just slightly close to the space-time corridor.

Soon, Ye Tian arrived at the place where the Silence Energy fluctuated abnormally.

In this area, the energy of silence surged, and the gray crystals slowly condensed.

"It's ......"

Ye Tian recognized these gray crystals.

On the exchange list, there is this gray crystal, called the Silence Crystal, which is a very common treasure of Silence in this time and space.

Although it is common, it is very precious, and I don't know how much more precious than the Silent Grass.

If the Silence Extinguishing Treasure is divided into levels, then the Silence Extinguishing Grass is at most a low-level Silence Extinguishing Treasure, while the Silence Extinguishing Crystal is a medium-level Silence Extinguishing Treasure, and one Silence Extinguishing Crystal is at least equivalent to dozens of Silence Extinguishing Grass.

And there are not just one or two Extinction Crystals that are about to be born here, but at least hundreds.

"The Silence Annihilation Energy fluctuates too much, and it is still expanding, once the Silence Annihilation Clan gets close here, with their Silence Annihilation Clan Fu, it will definitely be easy to sense!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Immediately, he urged the Silence Annihilation Clan Fu and began to absorb the Silence Energy here, trying to control the fluctuations.

Soon, the Silence Annihilation Energy Fluctuation was controlled by Ye Tian at a very stable level, so that the Silence Annihilation Clan could not sense it.

Of course, he had to control it all the time, and if he couldn't control it, the Silence Energy fluctuations would spread.

As time passed, the Silence Crystal began to condense.

In the blink of an eye, thousands of years have passed.

It's also fortunate that there was no invasion of the Silent Annihilation Clan during this time, otherwise he would definitely be blamed by the ancestors if he couldn't leave like this.

Thundered!!!!

The Silence Extinguishing Crystal was completely condensed and turned into brilliant gray crystals, and the fluctuations instantly affected the vast area, and even Ye Tian couldn't suppress such fluctuations.

"Close!"

Ye Tian quickly collected these Silent Extinction Crystals, and then used the Void Escape Ancestor Technique to return to the direction of the Sacred Continent as quickly as possible.

Just a few seconds after Ye Tian left, a terrifying figure appeared here.

This is an eight-striped Silencer!

He looked around, but he didn't find the treasure of Silence, and suddenly snorted coldly: "It's too late, I don't know who took it!"

And the ancestors knew more slowly, and when they came, they couldn't see anything.

These ancestors thought that the Silent Annihilation Treasure had been taken away by the Silent Annihilation Clan, but they didn't know that it had been taken away by Ye Tian.

After Ye Tian obtained these Silent Extinction Crystals, he immediately applied to return to the Dark Sanctuary.

Soon, he was sent back by Zhan Zu.

After that, he sent the Silent Annihilation Crystal to Ye Tian's body, and stayed for a few more days before returning to the Sacred Domain Continent and starting patrolling again.

---------------

Xuanxu Holy Realm.

Ye Tian held a Silent Extinguishing Crystal in his hand and began to absorb its energy.

Bang!!!!

Incomparably pure annihilation energy poured into Ye Tian's body, refining his Supreme Domain Body and Ancestral Body.

"What a powerful effect!"

Ye Tian said excitedly.

With so many Silent Extinction Crystals, I am afraid that he can refine his Supreme Domain Body to a level close to the middle stage of the Supreme Domain Body, and even the Ancestral Body can be tempered a lot.

In the blink of an eye, 100,000 years have passed.

At this time, Ye Tian had already refined these Silent Extinction Crystals, and his Supreme Domain Body, as he had guessed, was already very close to the middle stage of the Supreme Domain Body.

And his strength also soared, and he was closer to the combat power of the half-step ancestor.

......

Unconsciously, Ye Tian's copy body has been guarding the boundary of the Dark Forbidden Domain for a full billion years, and he doesn't know how many times he has died during this period, but he has also harvested a lot of Silence Treasures, and he has also exchanged some Silence Treasures.

It's a pity that he didn't have the same luck as the Silence Crystal, so the Silence Treasures he obtained were very ordinary.

But even so, these Silent Treasures also made his strength soar.

Now, he was using these Silent Destruction Treasures to impact the mid-stage realm of the Supreme Domain.

Once the impact is successful, he will have half-step Ancestor combat power.
